properties.Test Case: OBSOLETE: WAS TOO VAGUE Add a large jpg that Bloom will shrink, but not so big that it fails (that's the next row). img
properties.Steps: -- OBSOLETE: WAS TOO VAGUE Add a large jpg that Bloom will shrink, but not so big that it fails (that's the next row). img

properties.Test Case: Import the various images from "Should be auto-shrunk". Import both by a) copying file and b) copying image to clipboard. Hover over the image so that it shows you the dimensions. It should be reduced as per the file name. See example. Note starting Bloom 5.6 the problem of not reducing pixel size because Bloom found that a reduced version would be larger has been solved -- we'll now try to match the original file's Jpeg quality.)
properties.Steps:
-- Import the various images from "Should be auto-shrunk". Import both by a) copying file and b) copying image to clipboard. Hover over the image so that it shows you the dimensions. It should be reduced as per the file name. See example.
Note starting Bloom 5.6 the problem of not reducing pixel size because Bloom found that a reduced version would be larger has been solved -- we'll now try to match the original file's Jpeg quality.)

properties.Test Case: On a simple page with text and image, change the page division. - Snap points should occur at 33%, 50%, 66.7%, 75% as well a Match Previous Page and Fit Image. - Percentage should be whole numbers; try using CTRL and ensure %age is now in tenths of %age. - Double-click to match previous page dimensions. - Test on vertical divisions (portrait books) as well as horizontal divisions (landscape).
properties.Steps:
On a simple page with text and image, change the page division. 
- Snap points should occur at 33%, 50%, 66.7%, 75% as well a Match Previous Page and Fit Image. 
- Percentage should be whole numbers; try using CTRL and ensure %age is now in tenths of %age.
- Double-click to match previous page dimensions.
- Test on vertical divisions (portrait books) as well as horizontal divisions (landscape).

properties.Test Case: Longpress: Hold down a letter then select a special character 1) using mouse click; 2) using mousewheel; 3) using shortcut keys. Ensure problems in BL-12889 do not occur. (Test inserting long-press characters in multi-paragraph textbox with a) cursor at end of line; b) cursor in middle of line; c) cursor at beginning of line. In each case, the cursor should not jump but should be at the end of the insertion point.)
properties.Steps: - Longpress: Hold down a letter then select a special character 1) using mouse click; 2) using mousewheel; 3) using shortcut keys. Ensure problems in BL-12889 do not occur. (Test inserting long-press characters in multi-paragraph textbox with a) cursor at end of line; b) cursor in middle of line; c) cursor at beginning of line. In each case, the cursor should not jump but should be at the end of the insertion point.)

properties.Test Case: Enable a keyman keyboard, should work, should disable longpress. Switching back to English should re-enable longpress. Test steps in BL-4166. (This Keyman keyboard can test with 'a which should produce á : keyboard )
properties.Steps: - Enable a keyman keyboard, should work, should disable longpress. Switching back to English should re-enable longpress.  Test steps in BL-4166. (This Keyman keyboard can test with  'a  which should produce  á :  keyboard   )
